## Testing

How was this tested? What platforms?

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes with zero warnings
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] No new `.unwrap()` in non-test code
- [ ] New `unsafe` blocks have `// SAFETY:` comments
- [ ] Security-relevant changes have `// SECURITY:` comments
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits format with crate scope
- [ ] Each commit leaves the build green

## Security Impact

Does this PR change the isolation guarantees, IPC surface, policy parsing, or OS-level enforcement? If yes, describe the impact and how you verified it.
